title: copy: Add --digestfile
body:
`podman push` gained this a while ago, and we want it here for the
same reason.

Motivated by closing a race condition in ostree-rs-ext:
https://github.com/ostreedev/ostree-rs-ext/blob/17a991050c5bf371633695b0bbd5cdbb3d717bca/lib/src/container/export.rs#L85

comments.body: (Sorry for the lack of a patch to `integration/copy_test.go` but I am hacking on skopeo in a toolbox container and haven't worked out how to defeat the layers of abstraction in `make test-integration` and have it just operate on `/usr/bin/skopeo` there)
LGTM, once the tests are fixed.
OK it's going to be racy to try to compare the digests anyways, so I weakened the test to just assert there's a digest at all.
@cgwalters Could you fix the issues, so we can merge and generate a new skopeo release.
Updated (next time I do more here I'll try to figure out how to build and run these integration tests locally).
